name: payment-webhook-vietqr-unauth
_note: Public route. With 'vietqr' present in app_settings.payment_methods_enabled (CSV), handleWebhook passes assertEnabled then the VietQR strategy's verifyWebhook throws Unauthorized because no auth header/token is present -> both backends return 401 {"error":"Missing webhook authorization","code":"invalid-token","request_id":"<uuid>"}. request_id is the only non-deterministic field (per-request uuid) and is ignored. error+code are deterministic and COMPARED. PREREQUISITE: 'vietqr' MUST be in payment_methods_enabled, else assertEnabled returns 404 (a different but also identical-on-both parity result; this fixture targets the 401 branch). This is the safest webhook parity check: deterministic without any provider secret configured.
